svg.title: SPY over M2 money supply chart
svg.desc: Nominal S and P 500, US M2 money supply, and S and P 500 divided by M2 indexed to January 2000 equals 100.
svg.text: Indexed to Jan 2000 = 100. Adjusted line = S&P 500 price index / US M2 money stock.
Data: FRED M2SL; monthly S&P 500 dataset. Latest common month: Mar 2026.
